hero_subtitle: SFTY connects jurisdiction-specific KYT workflows with MiCA regulatory rules to help CASPs preserve audit evidence and maintain a structured compliance operating layer.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to connect KYT monitoring signals with evolving MiCA regulatory controls across jurisdictions. This disconnect creates gaps in audit readiness, manual case handling, and weak traceability between alerts, policy updates and compliance decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYT alerts, wallet risk data, regulatory updates and case workflows into a unified operating layer that supports MiCA-specific controls and preserves audit-ready evidence across jurisdictions.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to MiCA compliance review
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet risk alerts, applies MiCA-specific rules, routes reviews into cases and preserves evidence for defensible compliance decisions under MiCA.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One MiCA compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYT monitoring with MiCA-specific rules, turning scattered alerts into structured cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence for CASP compliance control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports CASPs managing MiCA KYT workflows with audit-ready evidence, provider orchestration, bank due diligence and enterprise-grade deployment from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for MiCA compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance layer connecting KYT, Travel Rule, onboarding, and regulatory rules into structured workflows tailored for MiCA jurisdiction and CASP requirements.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support MiCA KYT workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk signals, applies MiCA-specific policies, routes alerts for review, and links cases to support seamless KYT monitoring under MiCA.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision logs, provider outputs and evidence packages for audit readiness, supporting transparent and traceable MiCA compliance reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects multiple KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one operational workflow without replacing existing compliance tools or providers.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No, SFTY does not replace KYT or Travel Rule providers; it structures their outputs into consistent compliance cases, decisions and regulatory reports.
final_title: Connect KYT workflows to MiCA compliance controls
final_description: Review how SFTY supports MiCA-specific KYT monitoring, regulatory rule updates, audit evidence and structured compliance workflows for CASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
